home.intro: AI fairness researcher and social impact entrepreneur: working at the intersection of responsible AI, participatory evaluation, and critical education to build more accountable and equitable systems.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected work
projects.p1_abstract: EU-funded research project combining intersectional feminist theory with participatory AI practices to address biases in vision-language models. Part of the project management team and research engineering.
projects.p2_abstract: A collaborative, living playbook of good practices for stimulating critical thinking in AI-saturated classrooms. Built a theoretical framework and co-created with educators worldwide.
projects.p3_abstract: Designed and built the MVP for Synusia (a critical thinking training game) covering the conceptual frameworks and full game logic implementation.
projects.p4_abstract: Tailored AI strategy and adoption guidance for small organisations, rooted in their own values. Work covers strategy, responsible use guidelines, staff education, and generative search visibility.
projects.p5_abstract: Designed and taught a 90+ hour introductory course on generative AI and its applications for people with disabilities (33%+), supporting their reintegration into the labour market. Delivered through ONCE.
